$comment: Tool manifest for the Hermes Agent sandbox. Each tool is an HTTP-backed function whose schema matches app/services/hermes_tools.TOOL_SPECS. Point base_url at the Aegis CFO app reachable from inside the sandbox (host gateway IP or tunnel). If HERMES_TOOL_TOKEN is set in Aegis CFO, send it as a bearer token.

tools.name: gather_period
tools.description: GATHER: ledger entries + Stripe charges + active policy for the period.

tools.name: reconcile_ledger
tools.description: RECONCILE: match ledger vs Stripe; returns matched, stripe_only, ledger_only, amount_mismatch.

tools.name: compliance_replay
tools.description: COMPLIANCE REPLAY: re-evaluate each posted spend vs the policy in force; pass/fail + breaches.

tools.name: period_review
tools.description: PERIOD REVIEW: spikes, repeat vendors, trends over the window.

tools.name: categorize_spend
tools.description: CATEGORIZE: spend by category and vendor with totals.

tools.name: full_audit
tools.description: Run the whole flow and return the consolidated payload + escalations.
